ucs.title: [LLM] Bluenoroff 'Contagious Interview' BeaverTail/InvisibleFerret — node/npm spawning LOLBin downloader
ucs.description: Hunts Bluenoroff/Sapphire Sleet/TA444's 'Contagious Interview' / 'Dream Job' lure where a victim is sent a fake coding-assessment repo or NPM package; the postinstall (or hand-run `npm install`) triggers node.exe to spawn curl/wget/powershell/python which fetches the BeaverTail JS stager and the InvisibleFerret Python backdoor. The parent=node + child=downloader + URL pattern is the signature behavioural chain documented by Unit 42, Mandiant, Securonix and Phylum for this DPRK financial-crime crew.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_hash) as sha256 values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmdline from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("node.exe","npm.cmd","npm.exe","npx.cmd","yarn.exe","yarn.cmd") OR Processes.parent_process IN ("*\\node.exe*","*\\npm-cli.js*")) (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","certutil.exe","python.exe","python3.exe","pythonw.exe")) (Processes.process="*http*" OR Processes.process="*Invoke-WebRequest*" OR Processes.process="*DownloadString*" OR Processes.process="*iwr *" OR Processes.process="*IEX*" OR Processes.process="*.replit.app*" OR Processes.process="*ipcheck.cloud*" OR Processes.process="*npmaudit*" OR Processes.process="*nvmupdate*" OR Processes.process="*p.zi*" OR Processes.process="*tmpfox*" OR Processes.process="*n2.py*" OR Processes.process="*tmp.py*") by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename firstTime as firstSeen lastTime as lastSeen | convert ctime(firstSeen) ctime(lastSeen)
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
// Bluenoroff / Sapphire Sleet / TA444 'Contagious Interview' chain:
// fake coding-test repo or npm package -> node.exe (or npm/npx/yarn)
// spawns LOLBin downloader to stage BeaverTail JS / InvisibleFerret Python.
let _stager_indicators = dynamic([
    "iwr ","Invoke-WebRequest","DownloadString","IEX ","Invoke-Expression",
    ".replit.app",".vercel.app","glitch.me","onrender.com","ngrok",
    "ipcheck.cloud","npmaudit","nvmupdate","payloadname",
    "tmpfox","n2.py","tmp.py","p.zi",".npl"
]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("node.exe","npm.cmd","npm.exe","npx.cmd","yarn.exe","yarn.cmd")
| where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","certutil.exe","python.exe","python3.exe","pythonw.exe")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (_stager_indicators)
   or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("http://","https://")
// Tighten: cmdline references network egress or one of the known TA444 staging patterns
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          Child       = FileName,
          ChildCmd    = ProcessCommandLine,
          SHA256, IsRemote = IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
// Bluenoroff Contagious Interview behavioural chain on Sentinel (4688 + cmdline auditing required).
let _stager = dynamic([
    "iwr ","Invoke-WebRequest","DownloadString","IEX ","Invoke-Expression",
    ".replit.app",".vercel.app","glitch.me","onrender.com","ngrok",
    "ipcheck.cloud","npmaudit","nvmupdate","payloadname",
    "tmpfox","n2.py","tmp.py","p.zi",".npl"
]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where ParentProcessName endswith "\\node.exe"
     or ParentProcessName endswith "\\npm.cmd"
     or ParentProcessName endswith "\\npm.exe"
     or ParentProcessName endswith "\\npx.cmd"
     or ParentProcessName endswith "\\yarn.exe"
     or ParentProcessName endswith "\\yarn.cmd"
| where NewProcessName has_any (
    "\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe","\\cmd.exe","\\curl.exe","\\wget.exe",
    "\\certutil.exe","\\python.exe","\\python3.exe","\\pythonw.exe"
  )
| where CommandLine has_any (_stager)
     or CommandLine has_any ("http://","https://")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine,
          TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Bluenoroff Contagious Interview - Node spawning LOLBin downloader
id: 4a1b9c2d-3e2f-4a5b-9c1d-2e3f4a5b6c7d
status: experimental
description: Detects the Bluenoroff/TA444/Sapphire Sleet 'Contagious Interview' chain where node/npm/npx/yarn launches a downloader (powershell/curl/wget/python) reaching an HTTP(S) URL or known TA444 staging infrastructure.
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/13
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0098/
  - https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/contagious-interview-lazarus-tsunami/
  - https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/apt38-financial-cybercriminals
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\node.exe'
      - '\npm.cmd'
      - '\npm.exe'
      - '\npx.cmd'
      - '\yarn.exe'
      - '\yarn.cmd'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\curl.exe'
      - '\wget.exe'
      - '\certutil.exe'
      - '\python.exe'
      - '\python3.exe'
      - '\pythonw.exe'
  selection_intent:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'http://'
      - 'https://'
      - 'Invoke-WebRequest'
      - 'DownloadString'
      - 'IEX '
      - '.replit.app'
      - 'ipcheck.cloud'
      - 'npmaudit'
      - 'nvmupdate'
      - 'tmpfox'
      - 'n2.py'
      - 'tmp.py'
      - 'p.zi'
  filter_machine:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: selection_parent and selection_child and selection_intent and not filter_machine
fields:
  - User
  - ParentImage
  - Image
  - CommandLine
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate developers running build scripts that fetch resources via npm postinstall (baseline + allow-list developer hosts)
level: high
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1199
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1059.003
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.command_and_control
  - attack.t1105
  - attack.t1071.001
  - detection.threat_hunting
ucs.rationale: Generic 'PowerShell from node' would be noise, but the Bluenoroff/TA444 'Contagious Interview' chain has THREE concrete differentiators that other actors don't share: (1) node/npm/npx as the parent (developer-targeted social engineering, not phishing-attachment delivery), (2) downloader spawned to fetch BeaverTail/InvisibleFerret stagers, and (3) the specific TA444 infra footprints (replit.app/onr

_field_issues.message: `IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?

ucs.title: [LLM] APT38 / BeagleBoyz post-heist destructive wipe — VSS deletion + MBR/event-log clear cluster
ucs.description: Hunts the APT38 (Bluenoroff/Stardust Chollima/BeagleBoyz) destructive cleanup signature observed after SWIFT and crypto-exchange heists (Bangladesh Bank, Bancomext, Banco de Chile, Bank of Valletta): a tight cluster of shadow-copy deletion, Windows event-log clearing, and disk/MBR overwrite or scheduled-reboot — designed to delay forensics on the financial workstation while exfiltrated funds clear. The combination on the same host within minutes is far rarer than any individual technique and is APT38's calling-card.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.process_name) as bins values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents min(_time) as firstEvent max(_time) as lastEvent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","wbadmin.exe","bcdedit.exe","wevtutil.exe","cipher.exe","fsutil.exe","shutdown.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")) (Processes.process="*delete shadows*" OR Processes.process="*shadowcopy delete*" OR Processes.process="*Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy*" OR Processes.process="*delete catalog*" OR Processes.process="*recoveryenabled No*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures*" OR Processes.process="*wevtutil cl*" OR Processes.process="*clear-eventlog*" OR Processes.process="*cipher /w*" OR Processes.process="*fsutil usn deletejournal*" OR Processes.process="*shutdown /r*") Processes.user!="*$" by host Processes.user _time span=10m | where mvcount(bins) >= 3 OR (match(mvjoin(cmdlines,"||"),"delete shadows") AND match(mvjoin(cmdlines,"||"),"wevtutil")) | rename firstEvent as firstSeen lastEvent as lastSeen | convert ctime(firstSeen) ctime(lastSeen) | sort - lastSeen
ucs.kql:
let LookbackHours = 24h;
let WindowMinutes = 10m;
// APT38 / BeagleBoyz post-heist destructive cluster:
// VSS removal + event-log wipe + recovery-disable + reboot, on one host,
// inside a tight time window, as a non-machine account.
let _wipe = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackHours)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete shadows")
   or  (FileName =~ "wmic.exe"     and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
   or  (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe"  and ProcessCommandLine has "delete catalog")
   or  (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"  and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled","bootstatuspolicy"))
   or  (FileName =~ "wevtutil.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "cl ")
   or  (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
        and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy",
                                         "Clear-EventLog",
                                         "Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
   or  (FileName =~ "cipher.exe"   and ProcessCommandLine has "/w")
   or  (FileName =~ "fsutil.exe"   and ProcessCommandLine has "usn deletejournal")
   or  (FileName =~ "shutdown.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("/r","-r","/f"))
| extend Action = case(
    FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" or FileName =~ "wmic.exe" or ProcessCommandLine has "Shadowcopy", "vss_delete",
    FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe", "backup_delete",
    FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe", "recovery_disable",
    FileName =~ "wevtutil.exe" or ProcessCommandLine has "Clear-EventLog", "log_clear",
    FileName =~ "cipher.exe",  "disk_wipe",
    FileName =~ "fsutil.exe",  "usn_wipe",
    FileName =~ "shutdown.exe","reboot",
    "other");
_wipe
| summarize Actions = make_set(Action),
            ActionCount = dcount(Action),
            Cmds = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 20),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen = max(Timestamp)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, WindowMinutes)
| where ActionCount >= 2                              // multi-technique cluster, not single LOLBin
| where Actions has_any ("vss_delete","backup_delete","recovery_disable") // anchor on inhibit-recovery
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackHours = 24h;
let WindowMinutes = 10m;
// APT38 destructive-cluster hunt on Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688 (cmdline auditing required).
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackHours)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where (NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete shadows")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe"     and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wbadmin.exe"  and CommandLine has "delete catalog")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe"  and CommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled","bootstatuspolicy"))
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wevtutil.exe" and CommandLine has "cl ")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\cipher.exe"   and CommandLine has "/w")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\fsutil.exe"   and CommandLine has "usn deletejournal")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\shutdown.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("/r","-r","/f"))
     or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe")
         and CommandLine has_any ("Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Clear-EventLog"))
| extend Action = case(
    NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" or NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe" or CommandLine has "Shadowcopy", "vss_delete",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\wbadmin.exe", "backup_delete",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe", "recovery_disable",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\wevtutil.exe" or CommandLine has "Clear-EventLog", "log_clear",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\cipher.exe", "disk_wipe",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\fsutil.exe", "usn_wipe",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\shutdown.exe","reboot",
    "other")
| summarize Actions = make_set(Action),
            ActionCount = dcount(Action),
            Cmds = make_set(CommandLine, 20),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
            by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, WindowMinutes)
| where ActionCount >= 2
| where Actions has_any ("vss_delete","backup_delete","recovery_disable")
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Any one of these LOLBins (vssadmin, wbadmin, bcdedit, wevtutil, cipher) is borderline noise on its own — but APT38 / BeagleBoyz are documented (Mandiant, CISA AA20-239A, Symantec) for STACKING these in a tight window post-heist to inhibit recovery and erase forensic trail (Bangladesh Bank, Bank of Chile, Banco de Bancomext, Bank of Valletta). The cluster correlation (≥2 distinct destructive action
